---
title: Grouped stacked barplots with nested x axis in highcharter
author: Brecht Devleesschauwer
date: '2020-06-20'
slug: grouped-stacked-barplots-with-nested-x-axis-in-highcharter
categories: []
tags:
  - highcharts
---

```{r settings}
library(highcharter)
```

hello

```{r sessionInfo}
sessionInfo()
```
